parameters.query:
WITH avatars_cte AS (
  SELECT a.id as avatar_id, p.id as person_id, p.display_name, p.full_name,
         a.style_name, a.motion_preset, a.preview_video_url, a.preview_video_alpha_url,
         CASE WHEN p.voice_id IS NOT NULL AND p.voice_id != '' THEN true ELSE false END as has_voice
  FROM avatars a
  JOIN persons p ON a.person_id = p.id
  WHERE a.is_active = true
    AND (a.is_deleted IS NULL OR a.is_deleted = false)
    AND a.approval_status = 'approved'
    AND a.preview_video_alpha_url IS NOT NULL
    AND a.preview_video_alpha_url != ''
  ORDER BY p.display_name, a.style_name
),
bg_cte AS (
  SELECT id, label, category, cloudinary_url
  FROM client_backgrounds
  WHERE active = true
  ORDER BY category, sort_order, created_at DESC
),
music_cte AS (
  SELECT id as song_id, name, artist, audio_preview_url, cloudinary_url
  FROM songs
  WHERE cloudinary_url IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY name
)
SELECT json_build_object(
  'avatars', COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(a)) FROM avatars_cte a), '[]'::json),
  'backgrounds', COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(b)) FROM bg_cte b), '[]'::json),
  'tracks', COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(m)) FROM music_cte m), '[]'::json)
) as data;

WITH avatars_cte AS (
  SELECT a.id as avatar_id, p.id as person_id, p.display_name, p.full_name,
         a.style_name, a.motion_preset, a.preview_video_url, a.preview_video_alpha_url,
         CASE WHEN p.voice_id IS NOT NULL AND p.voice_id != '' THEN true ELSE false END as has_voice
  FROM avatars a
  JOIN persons p ON a.person_id = p.id
  WHERE a.is_active = true
    AND (a.is_deleted IS NULL OR a.is_deleted = false)
    AND a.approval_status = 'approved'
    AND a.preview_video_alpha_url IS NOT NULL
    AND a.preview_video_alpha_url != ''
  ORDER BY p.display_name, a.style_name
),
bg_cte AS (
  SELECT id, label, category, cloudinary_url
  FROM client_backgrounds
  WHERE active = true
  ORDER BY category, sort_order, created_at DESC
),
music_cte AS (
  SELECT id as song_id, name, artist, audio_preview_url, cloudinary_url
  FROM songs
  WHERE cloudinary_url IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY name
)
SELECT json_build_object(
  'avatars', COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(a)) FROM avatars_cte a), '[]'::json),
  'backgrounds', COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(b)) FROM bg_cte b), '[]'::json),
  'tracks', COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(m)) FROM music_cte m), '[]'::json)
) as data;
